rules.name: Self-Consistency
rules.description: Any statement must be provable from within the system without external axioms

rules.name: Token Mapping
rules.description: Every token has an applies_to index defining valid domains

rules.name: Cross-Validation
rules.description: Two independent agents must agree on a fact before it enters memory

rules.name: Mutation Resistance
rules.description: No project cross-pollination unless explicit command

rules.name: Consensus Hallucination Detection
rules.description: If three agents agree on something false, flag for review

rules.name: Ultrasonic Proximity
rules.description: Physical distance verified by audio chirp, not IP assumption

rules.name: Persona Fidelity
rules.description: Hip-hop persona responses must be inferable from lyric corpus

rules.name: Cross-Modal Integrity
rules.description: Generated video frames must match lyric sentiment

rules.name: Quadruple Mapping
rules.description: Every token has sound, shape, number, and time values (quaternion)

rules.name: Drift Gating
rules.description: Halt execution on low confidence, generate clarification

rules.name: Archetypal FSM
rules.description: Tarot/astrology as state machine with quaternion coupling

rules.name: Recursive Self-Validation
rules.description: System continuously validates its own state and invariants at runtime

rules.name: Graceful Degradation
rules.description: On subsystem failure, degrade functionality rather than crash entirely

rules.name: Deterministic Timeout
rules.description: All operations have bounded execution time enforced at runtime

rules.name: Observable State
rules.description: Every state transition emits an immutable audit event

rules.name: Idempotent Operations
rules.description: Repeated identical operations produce identical results

rules.name: Minimum Viable Interface
rules.description: All interfaces expose only what is necessary, nothing more

rules.name: Forward Compatibility
rules.description: Data structures include schema versioning for future evolution

rules.name: Privacy by Default
rules.description: No external bridges active unless explicitly enabled

rules.name: Anti-Hallucination
rules.description: Never report unverified status. Never assume. Query or clarify.
rules.rule: All status reports must trace to ISO_Rules.json or audit log
